reviews.comment:
Tranquilo y acogedor, lástima que para ir al baño tengas que hacer mil cosas desde conseguir la llave hasta ser cerrajero para que puedas entrar. Buena atención en general

(Translated by Google)
Quiet and welcoming, it's a shame that to use the bathroom you have to jump through hoops, from getting the key to practically being a locksmith just to get in. Good service overall.

reviews.comment:
Estos soretes no te dejan entrar al baño si no sos cliente, algo que no es legal.
Se demora un monton para cargar combustible.
El bar es una porqueria.

(Translated by Google)
These jerks won't let you use the bathroom if you're not a customer, which isn't legal.
It takes forever to get gas.
The bar is a dump.
